everyday_laptop.title: Everyday Laptop
everyday_laptop.description: Runs on a modern 4-core laptop/desktop CPU (Intel i5-11th gen / Ryzen 5) and, if available, a 4 GB GPU such as GTX 1650 or RTX 3050.

music_tuned_desktop.title: Music-Tuned Desktop
music_tuned_desktop.description: Designed for an 8-core desktop CPU (Intel i7-13th gen / Ryzen 7) paired with a 6-8 GB GPU (RTX 2060 / 3060).

musicgen_companion.title: MusicGen Companion
musicgen_companion.description: High-capacity encoder: best on a 12-core workstation CPU and ≥8 GB GPU (RTX 3080 / 4070).

edge_mobile.title: Ultra light
edge_mobile.description: Ultra-light—runs on phones, Raspberry Pi 5, or any device without a discrete GPU.
